name: Sefaria MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server for Sefaria — the open-source Jewish text library containing Torah, Talmud, Midrash, and thousands of other Jewish religious and scholarly texts. Enables AI agents to search, retrieve, and navigate the Sefaria corpus, accessing texts in Hebrew, Aramaic, and English translation with full cross-reference links.
use_cases: Searching and retrieving Jewish religious texts from Sefaria for research agents
Querying specific Torah, Talmud, or Midrash passages from educational agents
Exploring textual commentary chains and cross-references from scholarship agents
Building AI-assisted Jewish text study workflows with Sefaria's comprehensive library
not_for: General religious text research beyond the Jewish corpus (Sefaria is Jewish texts only)
Teams requiring texts not in Sefaria's collection
Applications requiring offline access to the full Sefaria library
best_when: A Jewish educator, student, rabbi, or researcher wants AI agents to access Sefaria's comprehensive library of Jewish texts — enabling intelligent text search, retrieval, and navigation across thousands of years of scholarship.
avoid_when: You need texts from other religious or scholarly traditions. Sefaria's scope is specifically Jewish religious and scholarly literature.

auth.notes: No authentication required — Sefaria API is publicly accessible. API key optional for higher rate limits.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sefaria API is free and openly available
pricing.notes: Sefaria is a non-profit with a free public API (CC licenses). MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Sefaria API: moderate rate limits for public access

known_agent_gotchas: Sefaria text references use specific citation formats (e.g., 'Genesis 1:1') — agents need to understand Sefaria's reference system
Hebrew and Aramaic text handling requires proper Unicode support in downstream pipelines
Large corpus with complex cross-references — agents may need multiple queries to explore chains
Sefaria API coverage is excellent but not all texts have English translations
agent_readiness.security_notes: Public API access. HTTPS. No credentials required. Sefaria texts are under CC licenses — review specific text licenses for commercial use.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public read-only API. HTTPS enforced. No credentials. CC licensed texts.
